parsed.production_notes: The video relies heavily on AI generation. The news anchor has unnatural, repetitive micro-movements and slightly mismatched lip-sync. The robot is a 3D render. The people in the bottom panels are static images with subtle AI-driven animations like blinking. Voices are AI text-to-speech.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s, slim build, fair complexion, shoulder-length curly brown hair. Professional and polished appearance.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue blazer over a maroon top.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. White and silver metallic body with visible panel lines. Humanoid face with dark eyes and lips.
Early 20s, medium build, brown complexion, short black hair, short beard.
characters.wardrobe: Blue shirt over a grey t-shirt, carrying a backpack.

characters.appearance: Early 20s, slim build, brown complexion, long straight black hair.
40s, medium build, fair complexion, grey hair and beard.
characters.wardrobe: Grey suit, white shirt, dark tie.

scenes.setting: News studio and various outdoor/office locations, bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A female news anchor (Character A) sits at a news desk. She has shoulder-length curly brown hair and wears a dark blue blazer over a maroon top. The background is a blue world map graphic typical of a news studio. The lighting is bright and even. She is looking directly at the camera and speaking.

Two young students, a female (Character D) and a male (Character C), stand outdoors on a campus. The male wears a blue shirt and backpack, the female wears a white top. Both are smiling warmly at the camera. The background shows blurred brick buildings and trees. The lighting is natural daylight.

An older male professional (Character E) stands in an office environment. He has grey hair and a beard, wearing a grey suit and tie. He is smiling confidently at the camera. The background shows a blurred modern office space. The lighting is bright and professional.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a composite layout with a news anchor in the top half and two separate images in the bottom half. The top panel shows a female news anchor in a studio setting with a blue world map background. The bottom left panel shows a young man and woman smiling outdoors on a campus. The bottom right panel shows an older man in a suit smiling in an office. Text overlays and a LIVE bug are present.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಕೇವಲ 15 ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಿಸೋ AI ಇವಾಗ ತುಂಬಾ ವೈರಲ್ ಆಗ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [In just 15 days, the AI that makes you speak English is going very viral now.]
Character A says: ಅವರು ನಮ್ಮ ಹತ್ರ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ತಯಾರಾಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [They are ready to speak with us.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
50 ಲಕ್ಷ ಜನರಿಗೆ (To 50 lakh people)
ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸುವ (teaching English)
AI app
ಕೇವಲ 15 ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ (In just 15 days)
ಮಾತಾಡಿಸೋ AI (AI that makes you speak)
ವೈರಲ್ ಆಗ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ (is going viral)
ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ತಯಾರಾಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ (ready to speak)
LIVE

scenes.setting: News studio, plain dark studio, and various outdoor/office locations.

panels.panel_visual_description: A female news anchor (Character A) sits at a news desk. She has shoulder-length curly brown hair and wears a dark blue blazer over a maroon top. The background is a blue world map graphic. She is looking directly at the camera, listening and occasionally speaking.

A female-presenting humanoid robot (Character B) is shown from the chest up. The robot has a white and silver metallic body with visible panel lines, and a face with dark eyes and lips. The background is a plain, dark grey studio setting. The robot is looking forward, appearing to speak.

Two young students, a female (Character D) and a male (Character C), stand outdoors on a campus. The male wears a blue shirt and backpack, the female wears a white top. Both are smiling warmly at the camera. The background shows blurred brick buildings and trees.

An older male professional (Character E) stands in an office environment. He has grey hair and a beard, wearing a grey suit and tie. He is smiling confidently at the camera. The background shows a blurred modern office space.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a four-panel grid layout. The top left panel features the female news anchor in her studio. The top right panel introduces a humanoid AI robot avatar against a dark background. The bottom left panel shows the two smiling students outdoors. The bottom right panel displays the older man in a suit in an office. Text overlays, captions, and a LIVE bug are visible throughout.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಹೇಳಿ ಆರ್ಯ, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಲು ನಿಜವಾಗ್ಲೂ ಗ್ರಾಮರ್, ಕೋಚಿಂಗ್ ಕ್ಲಾಸ್ ಅಂತ ಏನು ಬೇಕಾಗಿಲ್ವಾ? [Tell me Arya, to learn English, is grammar and coaching class really not needed?]
Character B says: ನೀವು ಹೇಳೋದು ನಿಜ. [What you say is true.]
Character B says: ನಾವು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನ ಬುಕ್ಸ್ ಇಂದ ಕಲಿತೀವಿ. [We learn English from books.]
Character B says: ಆದ್ರೆ ಫ್ಲುಯೆನ್ಸಿಗೆ ನಾವು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಭಾಷೆಯನ್ನ ನಮ್ಮ ಮಾತೃಭಾಷೆ ತರ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು. [But for fluency, we must learn by practicing speaking the English language like our mother tongue.]
Character B says: MySivi ಆಪ್ ಮೂಲಕ ನಾನು ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಬೈ ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಗೈಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸ್ತೀನಿ. [Through the MySivi app, I will teach English by guiding step by step.]
Character B says: ಹೀಗೆ ದಿನಾ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ವ್ಯತ್ಯಾಸ ನಿಮಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಾಗುತ್ತೆ. [If you practice daily like this, you will know the difference.]
Character B says: ಅದರಿಂದ ಕೇವಲ 15 ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು. [Therefore, you can speak English well in just 15 days.]
Character A says: ವಾವ್, ಸೂಪರ್. [Wow, super.]
Character A says: ಕಳೆದ ಎರಡು ವರ್ಷಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ನೀವು ಸುಮಾರು 50 ಲಕ್ಷ ಜನಕ್ಕೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸಿದ್ದೀರಾ ಎಂದು ಕೇಳಿದ್ದೀವಿ. [We have heard that in the last two years you have taught English to around 50 lakh people.]
Character B says: ಹೌದು, ಅವರುಗಳ ಲೆವೆಲ್ ಗೆ ತಕ್ಕಂತೆ ನಾನು ಪರ್ಸನಲೈಸ್ಡ್ ಟ್ರೈನಿಂಗ್ ಕೊಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Yes, I give personalized training according to their level.]
Character B says: ಉದಾಹರಣೆಗೆ ಕನ್ನಡ ಮಾತಾಡೋರಿಗೆ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲೇ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಭಾಷೆಯನ್ನ ಕಲಿಸ್ತೀನಿ. [For example, for Kannada speakers, I teach the English language in Kannada itself.]
Character B says: ಅದರಿಂದ ಎಲ್ಲರೂ ಸಂಕೋಚ ಇಲ್ಲದೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Because of that, everyone is learning English without hesitation.]
Character A says: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ಅಷ್ಟು ಖರ್ಚಾಗಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ ಕೇಳಿದ್ದೀವಿ, ನಿಜಾನಾ? [We heard that this doesn't cost much, is it true?]
Character B says: ಹೌದ್ರಿ, 30 ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 299 ರೂಪಾಯಿಗಳು ಮಾತ್ರ. [Yes, for 30 days it is only 299 rupees.]
Character B says: ಅದರ ಜೊತೆಗೆ 3 ದಿನ ಫ್ರೀ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ಕೂಡ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. [Along with that, there will also be a 3-day free trial.]
Character B says: ಇಷ್ಟ ಆದ್ರೆ ಮಾತ್ರ ಮುಂದುವರಿಸಬಹುದು. [You can continue only if you like it.]
Character B says: ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ನ ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡಿ 15 ದಿನಗಳ ಚಾಲೆಂಜ್ ನ ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Install the MySivi app right now and start the 15-day challenge right now.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A modern smartphone is shown in a three-quarter profile view, floating against a plain, light purple background. The phone has a sleek metallic edge and a large screen. The lighting is soft and studio-like, highlighting the edges of the device. No characters are present.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions to a single full-screen layout showing a 3D render of a smartphone. The phone is angled slightly, floating against a light purple background. The screen displays the app's logo and an install button.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Click on install now and download MySivi app. [Click on install now and download MySivi app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
MySivi
English speaking app
Install Now
